member.name: T:StopwatchApp.MainForm
member.summary: Main form for the Stopwatch application. Wires up the UI controls to the StopwatchLogic class.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises the form and all its child controls.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.InitialiseComponents
member.summary: Builds and lays out every control on the form.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.MakeButton(System.String,System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Point)
member.summary: Helper that creates a styled button at the given position.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.OnStart(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Starts the stopwatch from zero.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.OnPause(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Pauses the stopwatch and shows the current time in the status line.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.OnResume(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Resumes the stopwatch from the paused time.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.OnReset(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Resets the stopwatch back to 00:00:00.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.OnStop(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Stops the stopwatch and shows the final time.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.OnTick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Called every second while the stopwatch is running.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.UpdateDisplay
member.summary: Refreshes the time label with the latest elapsed time.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.MainForm.SetStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the status label text.

member.name: T:StopwatchApp.Program
member.summary: Entry point for the Stopwatch application.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.Program.Main
member.summary: Boots the Windows Forms application and opens the main form.

member.name: T:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic
member.summary: Handles all stopwatch state and time tracking logic. Keeps the UI layer separate from the core timer behaviour.

member.name: P:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the stopwatch is currently running.

member.name: P:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.HasStarted
member.summary: Gets whether the stopwatch has ever been started (i.e. time > 0 or running).

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.GetElapsedSeconds(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the total elapsed seconds, including any time from the current session.
member.param: The current second from the UI timer tick.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.Start(System.Int32)
member.summary: Starts the stopwatch from zero.
member.param: The current second provided by the UI timer.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.Pause(System.Int32)
member.summary: Pauses the stopwatch and saves elapsed time so far.
member.param: The current second at the moment of pausing.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.Resume(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resumes the stopwatch from where it was paused.
member.param: The current second at the moment of resuming.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.Reset
member.summary: Resets all state back to zero without stopping the UI timer.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.Stop(System.Int32)
member.summary: Stops the stopwatch and saves the current elapsed time.
member.param: The current second at the moment of stopping.

member.name: M:StopwatchApp.StopwatchLogic.FormatTime(System.Int32)
member.summary: Formats a total number of seconds into hh:mm:ss string format.
